results.title: In a word ... Dale Coye: Hames, tugs, britchin’ and crick
results.description: Last month, I wrote about those essential components of horse-drawn transportation, the whiffletree and the evener, but those words are just the beginning of a long list of harness-related words that have been largely forgotten. I say “largely” because, of course, those few who still have a cart and team of horses use these words [...]
